scripts.test: npm -w callibrate-core run test && npm -w callibrate-posthog-proxy run test && npm -w callibrate-satellite run test
scripts.type-check: npm -w callibrate-core run type-check && npm -w callibrate-satellite run type-check && npm -w callibrate-posthog-proxy run type-check && npm -w callibrate-matching run type-check
scripts.deploy:staging: npm -w callibrate-core run deploy:staging && npm -w callibrate-satellite run deploy:staging && npm -w callibrate-posthog-proxy run deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:prod: npm -w callibrate-core run deploy:prod && npm -w callibrate-satellite run deploy:prod && npm -w callibrate-posthog-proxy run deploy:prod
